title: Acurast Job Configuration
description: Configuration for Acurast decentralized serverless compute deployments. https://github.com/Acurast/acurast-cli#acurastjson

projects.description: Map of project keys to their deployment configurations.

fileUrl.description: Path to the bundled file (e.g. dist/bundle.js), an IPFS hash, or an HTTPS URL.

onlyAttestedDevices.description: Only allow hardware-attested devices to run this deployment.

enableDevtools.description: Forward console logs from processor executions to the DevTools dashboard.

startAt.description: Optional scheduled start time. Omit to start immediately.

msFromNow.description: Start this many milliseconds from now.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp (ms) at which the deployment starts.

assignmentStrategy.description: Controls how processors are assigned to executions.

type.description: Single: one set of processors reused for all executions. Competing: new processors assigned per execution.

instantMatch.description: Pin the job to specific processor(s) for instant assignment, bypassing the open matcher (Single strategy only). Each entry targets one processor.

processor.description: SS58 address of the target processor.

maxAllowedStartDelayInMs.description: Maximum allowed start delay for this processor (ms).

execution.description: Scheduling and timing for job executions.

type.description: onetime: run once. interval: run on a repeating schedule.

maxExecutionTimeInMs.description: Maximum wall-clock time per execution (ms). For interval jobs, set at least 10 000 ms less than intervalInMs.

intervalInMs.description: Time between execution starts (ms). Required when type is "interval".

numberOfExecutions.description: Total number of executions to run. Required when type is "interval".

maxAllowedStartDelayInMs.description: Maximum allowed start delay relative to the scheduled start time (ms).

usageLimit.description: Resource caps enforced during execution. 0 means unlimited.

numberOfReplicas.description: Number of processors that run this deployment in parallel.

requiredModules.description: Processor capability modules required. Shell is auto-injected when runtime is Shell.

runtime.description: Execution runtime. NodeJSWithBundle (default): bundled Node.js file. NodeJS: single Node.js file. Shell: native binary in a Linux distro image.

image.description: Linux distro image for the Shell runtime. Required when runtime is "Shell".

url.description: HTTPS URL to a .tar.xz distro image (e.g. from https://github.com/termux/proot-distro).

sha256.description: SHA256 hash of the image for download verification (64 hex chars).

entrypoint.description: Script or binary the processor runs after extracting the Shell image (e.g. acurast.sh).

restartPolicy.description: Restart policy for the Shell runtime process.

maxCostPerExecution.description: Maximum cost per execution in planck (smallest ACU denomination). 1 ACU = 1e12 planck.

includeEnvironmentVariables.description: Names of .env variables to encrypt and pass to processors at deploy time.

processorWhitelist.description: Restrict to specific processor addresses. Empty = allow any processor.

mutability.description: Whether the deployment can be modified after creation. Immutable is recommended for production.

reuseKeysFrom.description: Reuse encryption keys from a previous Mutable deployment. Format: ["Acurast", deployerAddress, deploymentId] or null.

items.description: SS58 address of the original deployer.
